headline: Canadian National upgraded by Bank of America on volume gains, attractive valuation
summary: Bank of America has raised its rating on Canadian National Railway (NYSE:CNI) shares to ‘Buy’ from ‘Neutral,’ citing improvements in service, volume growth, and an attractive valuation when compared to its peers. The firm also raised its price target on Canada’s largest freight railway to...

headline: How The Story Is Shifting For L3Harris Technologies (LHX) After Missile Spinout And 2028 Targets
summary: L3Harris Technologies is back in focus as analysts update their price targets following fresh company guidance and portfolio news. Recent research ties these higher targets to the refreshed 2028 framework and the planned missile solutions spinout backed by a US$1b preferred equity investment from the Department of War, rather than short term trading factors. As you read on, you will see how to follow the evolving narrative, what analysts are watching, and where the biggest debate points sit...

headline: Meta keeps Bank of America analysts bullish with early Muse Spark launch
summary: Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ:META, XETRA:FB2A, SIX:FB) has earned a repeat ‘Buy’ rating from Bank of America following the unexpected early launch of the company’s newest large language model, Muse Spark. Bank of America also kept its price target on Meta unchanged at $885, with shares up 3.4%...

headline: Bank of America Still Loves 4 Dividend Paying Energy Stocks Even After Oil Plunged
summary: While the two-week ceasefire came as a relief to many, especially after President Trump had ramped up the rhetoric, the reality is that while boats can move through the Strait of Hormuz, Bank of America reported that a stunning 11 million barrels per day of production remains shut in. headline: 341 Merrill Advisors Recognized on the 2026 Barron's "Top 1,500 Financial Advisors" List. Published on March 20, 2026. Ranking based on data as of September 30, 2025.
summary: Barron's recognized 341 Merrill Wealth Management and Merrill Private Wealth Advisors on its annual Top 1,500 Financial Advisors List (Published on March 20, 2026. Ranking based on data as of September 30, 2025). Merrill also had 9 advisors named No. 1 in the state. This high-level representation speaks directly to the quality of Merrill's talent and their dedication to serving client needs.

headline: BNY gives its employees a homeownership hand-up
summary: The bank is offering $6,500 in down payment assistance to employees who make $100,000 or less a year. BNY in recent years has raised its minimum wage and offered company stock to its lowest-paid workers.

headline: How The Mastercard (MA) Investment Story Is Evolving With New Payment Rails And Valuation Debates
summary: Mastercard's modeled fair value has been trimmed slightly, moving from US$662.59 to US$657.11, signaling only a small adjustment in the latest price target work. That fine tuning lines up with research that is generally constructive but split between more bullish views on electronic payments growth and more cautious takes on valuation, regulation, and new payment rails. As you read on, you will see how these shifting inputs shape the current analyst narrative and what to watch to stay on top...

headline: Bank Of America’s OCIO Leadership And AI Financing Set Against Valuation
summary: Bank of America has been ranked the top outsourced chief investment office provider for nonprofits globally, highlighting its role with mission focused institutions. The bank is also at the center of a potential $14b financing package for Oracle's new AI focused data center project in Michigan, which supports Oracle and OpenAI cloud infrastructure build out. For investors watching NYSE:BAC, these developments sit alongside a share price of $51.88 and a 42.8% return over the past year. Over...

headline: How The Smith Douglas Homes (SDHC) Story Is Shifting After Mixed Earnings And Lower Price Targets
summary: Smith Douglas Homes is back in focus after key banks reset their views, with price targets at JPMorgan moving to US$12 from US$19 and at BofA to US$11.50 from US$14. These shifts follow a mixed set of analyst updates that weigh Q4 earnings of US$0.39 per share and in line delivery guidance against concerns around orders, pricing and volume trends. Read on to see how these revised targets fit into the broader analyst narrative and how you can track the story from here. Analyst Price Targets...

headline: JPMorgan Lowers Bank of America (BAC) Target; UBS Also Trims Estimates
summary: Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) is included among the 13 Bank Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 7, JPMorgan analyst Vivek Juneja lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) to $57.50 from $61.50. It maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. The change came as part of a broader Q1 preview […]
